/private/tmp/llvm-20260531-48758-f18gbb/llvm-project-22.1.6.src/llvm/build/bin/clang++  -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk -bundle -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names  -Wl,-dead_strip -o MallocCheckerPlugin.dylib CMakeFiles/MallocCheckerPlugin.dir/plugin/MallocChecker.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,@loader_path/../lib -Wl,-rpath,/private/tmp/llvm-20260531-48758-f18gbb/llvm-project-22.1.6.src/llvm/build/./lib /private/tmp/llvm-20260531-48758-f18gbb/llvm-project-22.1.6.src/llvm/build/lib/libclang-cpp.dylib /private/tmp/llvm-20260531-48758-f18gbb/llvm-project-22.1.6.src/llvm/build/lib/libLLVM.dylib
